temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) A woman in a brown leather jacket stands in a dimly lit room, talking on a cordless phone with a worried expression. She looks towards a doorway, her face filled with concern as she listens to the person on the other end. (Storyline: The scene opens on a tense phone conversation, establishing a sense of urgency and worry. The woman's expression suggests she is receiving bad news.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Worried, urgent. 2) Background sounds or music: Faint, tense ambient music.)
(00:04-00:07) The scene cuts to an older man in a light-colored suit and a floral shirt, walking through a crowded, dimly lit outdoor area at night. He is on the phone, looking stressed and defensive as he speaks. (Storyline: This intercut introduces a second character who is also in a state of distress and denial, connecting his conversation to the woman's earlier warning.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Defensive, agitated. 2) Background sounds or music: The ambient sound of a crowd and tense music continues.)
